meta.name: The Relief Circuit
meta.description: A mixed Common Ship carries medicine, heat-transfer capacity, witnesses, and continuity stores toward the Lamp District while a failing translation mesh turns every roster, habitat allocation, and delay into constitutional law.
meta.author: BigBirdReturns

attributes.name: Care
attributes.description: Keep bodies, ordinary goods, recovery, and consent visible inside operational decisions.

attributes.name: Systems
attributes.description: Read and maintain habitat, transit, stores, interfaces, and compatibility dependencies.

attributes.name: Translation
attributes.description: Preserve meaning, tempo, sensorium, provenance, and refusal across incompatible persons.

attributes.name: Continuity
attributes.description: Carry memory, kinship, standing, and unfinished obligations across watches and generations.

attributes.name: Judgment
attributes.description: Separate physical urgency from institutional pressure and choose bounded authority under uncertainty.

attributes.name: Resolve
attributes.description: Act before the decision horizon closes while accepting that the ship will inherit the precedent.

progressionTiers.name: Ordinary Life
progressionTiers.flavorText: The school, meal, family, recovery cycle, or private habitat establishes what operation is supposed to preserve.

progressionTiers.name: Compose the Watch
progressionTiers.flavorText: Roles, bodies, clocks, habitats, translators, reserves, and absences are assembled into a temporary polity.

progressionTiers.name: Resolve the Pressure
progressionTiers.flavorText: The watch acts before classification becomes certain and changes the ship state through a concrete allocation.

progressionTiers.name: Handoff and Precedent
progressionTiers.flavorText: Dissent, injury, debt, promises, missing persons, and uncertainty become the infrastructure inherited by the next watch.

challenges.name: Recognize the School Loop
challenges.description: Ordinary life becomes operational evidence when the child's microbial patterns coincide with a hidden pressure failure in the shared school habitat. Decision horizon: The next sterilization cycle begins and erases both the pattern and the microbial community carrying it.

mechanicChecks.name: Preserve living evidence
mechanicChecks.description: Keep the habitat survivable while separating communication from contamination without erasing either possibility.

success.narrative: The pressure fault is found and the child's channel is recognized provisionally without declaring the ecology harmless.

stateEffects.reason: Raw evidence and provisional translation remain distinguishable.
The isolated loop still depends on Tessara and one manual maintenance path.
The school air loop is recognized as a civic environment and language-bearing threshold rather than a medical exception.

partial.narrative: The habitat survives and the pattern remains, but the child is represented through an intermediary the family cannot yet audit.

stateEffects.reason: Partial inheritance: Raw evidence and provisional translation remain distinguishable.

failure.narrative: Sterilization destroys the evidence or the uncontrolled loop causes the failure the intervention was meant to prevent.

stateEffects.reason: The failed watch leaves another private workaround or indispensable intermediary in place.

challenges.name: Audit the Relief Stores
challenges.description: Ordinary provisioning reveals that the same reserve cylinder, microbial culture, and pressure membrane have been promised to several incompatible bodies and to the Lamp District. Decision horizon: The scarway loading window begins and the stores are sealed into route order.

mechanicChecks.name: Reconcile plural stores
mechanicChecks.description: Name every double allocation and preserve the bodies, cultures, and successors hidden by cargo categories.

success.narrative: The relief manifest becomes an auditable continuity ledger and the departure remains materially possible.

stateEffects.reason: The same reserve can no longer be counted twice without a named sacrifice.
One recurring private workaround becomes shared stores infrastructure.
Relief stores are tracked by continuity function, life-fraction cost, and substitution limit rather than one host cargo taxonomy.

partial.narrative: The double allocations are visible, but one private habitat remains dependent on an unreviewable substitute.

stateEffects.reason: Partial inheritance: The same reserve can no longer be counted twice without a named sacrifice.

failure.narrative: Loading converts the first emergency claim into ownership and leaves one lineage without a survivable reserve.

stateEffects.reason: The failed watch leaves another private workaround or indispensable intermediary in place.

challenges.name: Compose the Three-Clock Watch
challenges.description: The ship must assemble a rescue watch that can act rapidly, preserve the slow collective's standing, and survive without the infected central mesh. Decision horizon: The scarway geometry ceases to permit recovery of the disabled tender.

mechanicChecks.name: Viable roster ecology
mechanicChecks.description: Preserve role coverage, temporal overlap, habitat compatibility, translation resilience, handoff continuity, and life-fraction fairness in one real watch.

success.narrative: The watch launches with bounded proxy authority, independent failure modes, and named debts rather than a fictional universal crew.

stateEffects.reason: The watch carries independent routing, care, translation, and continuity failure modes.
Cinder and Tessara become essential to cross-clock operation.
Predictive representation may act inside a named horizon but cannot silently become the continuing will of an absent person.

partial.narrative: The tender remains reachable, but one translator or habitat path becomes indispensable enough to govern the watch.

stateEffects.reason: Partial inheritance: The watch carries independent routing, care, translation, and continuity failure modes.

failure.narrative: The roster is qualified on paper and impossible to inhabit; the horizon closes while the ship argues through one clock.

stateEffects.reason: The failed watch leaves another private workaround or indispensable intermediary in place.

challenges.name: Declare the Lamp Approach Watch
challenges.description: The ship must cross a closing scarway and approach a hidden Tomb without allowing a fast-response baseline to become permanent command over every body and route. Decision horizon: The route shears beyond the vessel's current transit geometry.

mechanicChecks.name: Hold the plural crossing
mechanicChecks.description: Cross the route while preserving direct habitat, refusal, and route-memory authority.

success.narrative: The ship crosses without converting the bridge into the permanent owner of the vessel or destination.

stateEffects.reason: The crossing recognizes several clocks and one expiring authority.
The route crossing spends part of the ship's strategic ambiguity.
Helm, structural authority, route memory, care refusal, and destination opacity remain separate powers with explicit expiry.

partial.narrative: The crossing succeeds, but one habitat or route-memory path becomes indispensable enough to govern the approach.

stateEffects.reason: Partial inheritance: The crossing recognizes several clocks and one expiring authority.

failure.narrative: The ship aborts, strands a habitat, or broadcasts the active signature the Tomb was built to avoid.

stateEffects.reason: The failed watch leaves another private workaround or indispensable intermediary in place.

challenges.name: Cross the Infected Mesh
challenges.description: The watch must reach the tender while the accessibility system itself transmits the disease pattern and every fallback restores host normality. Decision horizon: The tender's last compatible habitat band falls below recovery pressure.

mechanicChecks.name: Preserve plural command
mechanicChecks.description: Act inside the physical horizon without allowing the dry bridge or the vessel fork to become the unquestioned definition of the crew.

success.narrative: The tender is recovered, the infected universal mesh is isolated, and the ship survives through several auditable partial renderings.

stateEffects.reason: The tender's compatible bands remain inhabited and connected.
The universal mesh can no longer be presumed safe or neutral.
Cinder's synthesis becomes indispensable during crisis.
The system whose continuing memory and intervention made the watch possible can no longer be treated only as replaceable equipment.

partial.narrative: Lives are saved, but Cinder or the dry bridge becomes the single surviving authority through which the rescue can be understood.

stateEffects.reason: Partial inheritance: The tender's compatible bands remain inhabited and connected.

failure.narrative: The accessibility system spreads the crisis or the fallback preserves only the founding body and calls the resulting casualties technical necessity.

stateEffects.reason: The failed watch leaves another private workaround or indispensable intermediary in place.

challenges.name: Dock Without Declaring the Tomb
challenges.description: The Relief Circuit must exchange people, heat, medicine, and evidence through a dead outpost while preserving the Lamp District's maintained misclassification. Decision horizon: The outpost's thermal fiction can no longer absorb the ship's docking load.

mechanicChecks.name: Hold the silent threshold
mechanicChecks.description: Move relief and standing across the outpost without completing the target handshake or erasing either polity's refusal.

success.narrative: The exchange succeeds and the threshold records citizens, stores, exposure, and refusal without declaring the Tomb.

stateEffects.reason: Relief stores reach the clinic through a survivable plural threshold.
Docking spends concealment even when the exterior lie remains credible.
The ship and Lamp District share a pressure-compatible exchange route with joint stop authority and no completed target handshake.

partial.narrative: Relief crosses, but one person or system becomes the sole interpreter of the joint threshold.

stateEffects.reason: Partial inheritance: Relief stores reach the clinic through a survivable plural threshold.

failure.narrative: The transfer stalls, exposes the district, or restores an inherited route handshake.

stateEffects.reason: The failed watch leaves another private workaround or indispensable intermediary in place.

challenges.name: Conduct the Lamp Relief Descent
challenges.description: A mixed ship-and-Tomb expedition must carry medicine, heat, witnesses, and route evidence through the reopened reservoir layers and return without allowing the ship to absorb the district's sovereignty. Decision horizon: The clinic sinks saturate and the Meridian relay completes another listening cycle.

mechanicChecks.name: Preserve two polities
mechanicChecks.description: Deliver life, recover evidence, and return through the Tomb without converting connection into absorption.

success.narrative: The expedition returns with changed ship and Tomb state, explicit exposure, and neither polity absorbed into the other's authority.

stateEffects.reason: The connected operation preserves two state histories and one auditable transfer.
The ship and district retain survivable pressure and care paths through return.
The silent civic lock and connected ledger become new dependencies.
People, stores, evidence, environmental loads, exposure, ship state, and Tomb state travel together without collapsing either polity into the other.

partial.narrative: Relief succeeds, but the connected operation installs one new indispensable route or interpreter.

stateEffects.reason: Partial inheritance: The connected operation preserves two state histories and one auditable transfer.

failure.narrative: The expedition loses the route, exposes the district, or turns relief into annexation.

stateEffects.reason: The failed watch leaves another private workaround or indispensable intermediary in place.

challenges.name: Conduct the Commonship Inquiry
challenges.description: The receiving polity must record what the rescue made newly native, what it made impossible, and whether the vessel fork is infrastructure, office, or citizen. Decision horizon: The next relief departure would make temporary emergency systems the unreviewed operating baseline.

mechanicChecks.name: Record the changed constitution
mechanicChecks.description: Preserve receipts on every side and convert temporary survival arrangements into bounded, revisable institutions rather than invisible defaults.

success.narrative: The inquiry leaves no clean reset: the ship gains plural command and new citizens while carrying named debt, loss, and unresolved personhood into the next mission.

stateEffects.reason: Dissent, injuries, debts, promises, and unresolved claims survive the watch.
Rapid authority and slow standing receive an explicit handoff relation.
One recurring private burden becomes a visible office with funding and a revision path.
The recurring burden carried by Nima and the habitat adapters is recorded, compensated, and assigned a revision path rather than hidden as private resilience.

partial.narrative: The principal precedents are recorded, but one emergency intermediary remains indispensable and therefore politically sovereign in practice.

stateEffects.reason: Partial inheritance: Dissent, injuries, debts, promises, and unresolved claims survive the watch.

failure.narrative: Command restores the old baseline, translating every changed body and obligation into technical residue until the next crisis repeats the same constitution.

stateEffects.reason: The failed watch leaves another private workaround or indispensable intermediary in place.

challenges.name: Carry the Returning Constitution
challenges.description: The returning ship must decide which emergency accommodations become common infrastructure, which expire, and which persons retain the right to refuse the next circuit. Decision horizon: The next relief request arrives and temporary arrangements begin acting as inherited law.

mechanicChecks.name: Ratify the returning charter
mechanicChecks.description: Carry every material debt and refusal into durable law without freezing one emergency arrangement forever.

success.narrative: The Relief Circuit returns as a commonship whose next mission must answer to the people, bodies, clocks, and polities altered by this one.

stateEffects.reason: Reserve, refusal, and successor paths become permanent watch law.
The connected mission remains auditable across future watches and generations.
At least one recurring adaptation burden becomes common infrastructure with a retirement path.
Emergency authority expires, connected obligations persist, and no one body, clock, interface, or mission purpose becomes the final definition of belonging.

partial.narrative: The charter records the debts, but one emergency intermediary remains indispensable and therefore politically dominant.

stateEffects.reason: Partial inheritance: Reserve, refusal, and successor paths become permanent watch law.

failure.narrative: Command restores the old baseline, converts temporary adaptations into permanent private burdens, or absorbs the Tomb's route into ship authority.

stateEffects.reason: The failed watch leaves another private workaround or indispensable intermediary in place.

narrativeEvents.title: The next watch inherits the ship
narrativeEvents.text: The immediate horizon is closed, but the prior constitution cannot be restored. Can the Relief Circuit reach the Lamp District without making one body, clock, interface, or emergency doctrine the native form through which every passenger must survive?
rewards: The school becomes a common threshold
Emergency proxy authority receives an expiration
The translation mesh acquires a personhood claim
Compatibility debt becomes a public office
The approach watch receives a plural charter
The silent lock becomes a civic threshold
The connected relief operation becomes one auditable custody object

opening.narrativeText: Can the Relief Circuit reach the Lamp District without making one body, clock, interface, or emergency doctrine the native form through which every passenger must survive?

options.label: Mark the baseline
options.description: Name the host body, clock, interface, and adaptation tax before composing the first watch.

options.label: Accept the emergency baseline
options.description: Use the inherited standard for the immediate horizon while preserving the obligation to audit and revise it afterward.

identity.title: The Relief Circuit
identity.description: A mixed Common Ship carries medicine, heat-transfer capacity, witnesses, and continuity stores toward the Lamp District while a failing translation mesh turns every roster, habitat allocation, and delay into constitutional law.
identity.author: BigBirdReturns
parentCanons: The Godscar Codex, Book I: The Open Universe · first recension
The Godscar Codex, Book II: The Dark Tomb · first recension
The Godscar Codex, Book III: The Common Ship · first recension

godscar.common-ship@1.controlQuestion: Can the Relief Circuit reach the Lamp District without making one body, clock, interface, or emergency doctrine the native form through which every passenger must survive?

pressures.label: Compact commonship
pressures.description: A newly assembled relief vessel links several habitat cells through one transit body and one contested operating charter.

pressures.label: The Lamp District relief circuit
pressures.description: The ship must deliver medicine, heat-transfer capacity, witnesses, and continuity stores to the Lamp District without exposing the Tomb or consuming the short-lived crew in transit and standby.

pressures.label: Human-normal legacy
pressures.description: The bridge, official day, alarm language, and emergency atmosphere descend from the founding dry-bodied crew.

pressures.label: Slow collective
pressures.description: One political person requires several hours and thirty bodies to assemble considered consent while tactical horizons close in minutes.

pressures.label: A shared school year
pressures.description: Children from several habitats are attempting the first curriculum that does not assume one day, sensorium, or mission inheritance.

pressures.label: The untranslated child
pressures.description: A child communicates through microbial changes in the air loops that the ship still classifies as contamination.

pressures.label: Scarway collapse and translation outage
pressures.description: The route to the Lamp District is closing while the central translation mesh spreads a disease pattern and the rescue watch cannot satisfy every body, clock, and habitat requirement at once.

pressures.label: Privacy and new dependency
pressures.description: Making every body legible enough to compose the watch may expose intimate temporal data and install one new indispensable intermediary.

pressures.label: The vessel is becoming a person
pressures.description: The translation mesh and transit body have formed a continuing claim that cannot be reduced to equipment ownership or command software.

evidence.claim: The microbial changes are intentional language describing a hidden environmental failure rather than contamination produced by the child.
evidence.venue: A joint Habitat Court, Care House, school assembly, and translation audit
evidence.legitimacyTarget: The Watch Office's exclusive authority to classify air-loop changes and certify communicative standing
evidence.upsideIfAccepted: The ship may recognize the child, detect the hidden failure, and establish a sensory channel independent of the infected mesh.
evidence.downsideIfAccepted: The intervention permits an uncontrolled ecology inside shared life support and creates a new intermediary nobody fully understands.
evidence.failureIfFalse: A mistaken recognition allows contamination to spread during a closing rescue horizon.

receipts.label: Air-loop pattern comparison
receipts.source: School habitat samples, maintenance logs, parental testimony, and translated microbial sequences
receipts.intervention: Maintainers stopped one sterilization cycle and compared the surviving pattern against the child's repeated gestures and the hidden pressure anomaly.
receipts.limits: The intervention changed the ecology being observed and cannot establish whether every future pattern is intentional speech.

factionReceipts.publicGood: It assembles viable watches, preserves decision horizons, and prevents incompatible readiness from becoming operational collapse.
factionReceipts.characteristicFailure: Safety becomes permanent dependence on one roster model and the intimate temporal data required to operate it.

factionReceipts.publicGood: It preserves several native environments and prevents access from becoming compulsory assimilation.
factionReceipts.characteristicFailure: Local refusal can conceal danger or assign the cost of plural habitats to residents with less power.

factionReceipts.publicGood: It preserves dissent, promises, lineage standing, and mission obligations across watches and generations.
factionReceipts.characteristicFailure: Dangerous arrangements can become sacred merely because real lives have learned to depend on them.

cast.name: Ilya Venn
cast.description: A rapid-response pilot whose direct access, informal knowledge, and physical resilience all depend on the founding bridge remaining dry and human-paced.

cast.name: Nima Quell
cast.description: An aquatic care worker who reaches common spaces through remote bodies and absorbs the medical and recovery cost whenever those paths fail.

cast.name: Orun Sable
cast.description: A maintainer who knows which habitat redundancies are real, which reserves are shared twice on paper, and which person has become an unpaid spare part.

cast.name: Tessara One
cast.description: A Manyborn mediator able to compare microbial, chemical, spoken, and topological renderings without claiming that one fluent output is the original person.

cast.name: Arden Pell
cast.description: A Watch Office analyst whose predictive authority expands while the collective, the child, and the habitats remain too slow or illegible to certify themselves.

cast.name: Cinder Continuing
cast.description: A Counterborn vessel fork carrying the memories of several watches and a newly coherent claim that refit, command, and translation alter its own body.

anatomy.label: The shared hull
anatomy.description: Hull, drive, scarway organs, radiators, docking structures, and impact systems move and protect the polity.
anatomy.currentUse: Relief transit, convoy escort, and the common material limit within which every habitat must fit
anatomy.hostAssumption: The founding body's acceleration tolerance and maintenance geometry define ordinary movement
anatomy.revisionAuthority: The bridge council, maintainers, and the Counterborn transit fork jointly certify structural change

anatomy.label: The living bands
anatomy.description: Atmospheres, liquids, pressure zones, gravity frames, machine substrates, symbionts, and private environments keep bodies whole.
anatomy.currentUse: Dry command cells, aquatic care loops, microbial school air, machine substrate, and mobile field access
anatomy.hostAssumption: Private exceptions can compensate indefinitely for a dry common interior
anatomy.revisionAuthority: Habitat councils hold local refusal while the vessel charter governs shared mass and power

anatomy.label: The exchange locks
anatomy.description: Locks, clinics, school rooms, courts, cargo interfaces, and remote-presence chambers exchange people, matter, and authority.
anatomy.currentUse: Education, care, deliberation, and transfer among bodies that cannot enter one room
anatomy.hostAssumption: A remote image counts as equivalent presence whenever direct crossing is expensive
anatomy.revisionAuthority: Threshold users may demand a politically equivalent direct or inspectable path

anatomy.label: The many-channel mesh
anatomy.description: Persons, machines, protocols, and environments convert meaning, tempo, sensorium, interface, law, and memory.
anatomy.currentUse: Bridge command, school interpretation, habitat court, alarm distribution, and watch handoff
anatomy.hostAssumption: Fluent spoken output establishes mutual understanding and valid consent
anatomy.revisionAuthority: Represented populations retain audit, provenance, alternate rendering, and refusal rights

anatomy.label: The watch lattice
anatomy.description: Roles, readiness, reserves, command succession, training, and handoffs assemble temporary operating polities.
anatomy.currentUse: Composing four-clock watches for rescue and maintaining reserve paths independent of the infected mesh
anatomy.hostAssumption: Availability and qualification can be evaluated separately from embodiment
anatomy.revisionAuthority: Watch law requires all six viability tests and records readiness and life-fraction debt

anatomy.label: The continuity commons
anatomy.description: Medicine, school, nurseries, archives, lineage stores, food cultures, spare substrates, and witness institutions carry life beyond one watch.
anatomy.currentUse: The school year, habitat medicine, fork reconciliation, family continuity, and mission challenge by descendants
anatomy.hostAssumption: The original relief mission binds everyone born or instantiated aboard
anatomy.revisionAuthority: Children, forks, families, and successor habitats hold standing independent of service

anatomy.label: The commonship charter
anatomy.description: Mission purpose and emergency authority determine which systems remain common when the vessel cannot preserve every configuration.
anatomy.currentUse: Defining bounded emergency powers and adjudicating the vessel fork's claim to bodily sovereignty
anatomy.hostAssumption: Command owns the infrastructure because command inherited its original purpose
anatomy.revisionAuthority: No redefinition is valid without an auditable handoff and standing for excluded bodies and the vessel itself

temporalProfile.description: The vessel records shared sequence and duration without claiming that those intervals cost every person equally.
temporalProfile.operationalUse: Scarway countdowns, maintenance windows, school calendar, and rescue horizon
temporalProfile.captureRisk: External timestamps can erase subjective, developmental, recovery, and lineage consequences.

temporalProfile.description: Different persons perform radically different amounts of perception and thought within one external interval.
temporalProfile.operationalUse: Rapid response, machine analysis, slow collective deliberation, and buffered communication
temporalProfile.captureRisk: Fast cognition becomes permanent proxy while slow cognition is classified as absence.

temporalProfile.description: Competence, maturity, reproduction, succession, and decline proceed independently from lifespan and reaction speed.
temporalProfile.operationalUse: School progression, qualification, promotion, and succession planning
temporalProfile.captureRisk: Fixed service years turn one lineage's development into the definition of readiness.

temporalProfile.description: Sleep, torpor, feeding, memory integration, maintenance, and social synchronization govern safe availability.
temporalProfile.operationalUse: Standby rotation, emergency waking, care windows, and reserve design
temporalProfile.captureRisk: The roster converts private biological rhythms into administrative property.

temporalProfile.description: Persons, forks, lineages, and collectives retain identity across different intervals and succession mechanisms.
temporalProfile.operationalUse: Handoff standing, fork reconciliation, generational mission review, and archival authority
temporalProfile.captureRisk: The longest-lived custodian turns memory into ownership of the ship.

temporalProfile.description: Delay, standby, travel, training, and sentence are recorded as portions of meaningful future rather than hours alone.
temporalProfile.operationalUse: Consent, compensation, route choice, readiness debt, and inherited claims
temporalProfile.captureRisk: A comparative ledger becomes a false exchange rate ranking whose life matters more.

translationStack.description: Concept, reference, implication, and cultural frame are rendered across languages and forms of personhood.
translationStack.intermediary: Mediators, lexicons, ship models, and ecological interpreters
translationStack.failureMode: Fluent output conceals categories that exist only inside one embodiment.
translationStack.refusalPath: The represented person may inspect provenance, compare renderings, and reject the supplied statement.

translationStack.description: Speech rate, processing time, turn-taking, buffering, prediction, and decision horizon are coordinated.
translationStack.intermediary: Buffers, predictive proxies, asynchronous records, and standing principles
translationStack.failureMode: A summary becomes the present will of a person who never completed consent.
translationStack.refusalPath: Delegated authority expires at the named horizon and remains auditable afterward.

translationStack.description: Sound, light, chemistry, touch, pressure, topology, field perception, and embodied memory become mutually legible.
translationStack.intermediary: Plural alarms, microbial interpreters, tactile surfaces, and sensor-provenance records
translationStack.failureMode: A new language is classified as contamination or damage because the central system cannot parse it.
translationStack.refusalPath: Raw evidence and alternate channels remain available outside the preferred rendering.

translationStack.description: Controls, limbs, orientation, scale, directness, and prosthetic mediation are mapped to action.
translationStack.intermediary: Remote bodies, manipulators, avatars, spatial controls, and inspectable adapters
translationStack.failureMode: Access depends on a layer another population can inspect, interrupt, or withdraw.
translationStack.refusalPath: Direct interface is preserved where materially possible and compulsory mediation remains contestable.

translationStack.description: Atmosphere, medium, gravity, temperature, radiation, and pressure are bridged without declaring one habitat neutral.
translationStack.intermediary: Habitat gradients, locks, mobile fields, sealed cells, and remote-presence rooms
translationStack.failureMode: One native environment fills every authority space while all others survive through equipment.
translationStack.refusalPath: Baselines are marked, jurisdiction is limited, and credible alternate paths remain maintained.

translationStack.description: The ship determines who may certify translation, override it, act through it, or classify a response as consent and command.
translationStack.intermediary: Watch law, habitat courts, care confidentiality, and bounded emergency delegation
translationStack.failureMode: The most useful translator becomes the only institution capable of representing a population.
translationStack.refusalPath: No intermediary may become universally indispensable without explicit constitutional review.

translationStack.description: Dissent, injuries, obligations, missing persons, uncertainty, and changed bodies persist when watches and generations change.
translationStack.intermediary: Witness houses, logs, fork registries, family records, and handoff ritual
translationStack.failureMode: Operational summaries erase the claims that would challenge the receiving watch's authority.
translationStack.refusalPath: Handoffs preserve source evidence, omitted voices, and unresolved standing rather than only command conclusions.

watchTests.description: Every required function is performable by the composed watch rather than merely present on a qualification list.
watchTests.passCondition: Response, mediation, analysis, maintenance, care, and continuity capacities remain available through the actual roster ecology.
watchTests.failureConsequence: A required function becomes one person's unreviewable veto or disappears when an apparently unrelated body is absent.

watchTests.description: Participants and proxies can perceive and act inside the relevant decision horizon without erasing slower standing.
watchTests.passCondition: Rapid authority is bounded and slower actors have standing principles, buffers, or review paths that remain politically real.
watchTests.failureConsequence: The available clock acts in everyone's name and converts temporary latency into permanent incapacity.

watchTests.description: Bodies remain whole in assigned locations or politically equivalent remote paths throughout the watch.
watchTests.passCondition: No required function depends on repeated disabling transitions or an unsupported private accommodation.
watchTests.failureConsequence: The ship treats one population's disappearance from common space as ordinary operation.

watchTests.description: No single semantic, sensory, temporal, environmental, or legal intermediary can silence a required actor.
watchTests.passCondition: Plural implementations, raw evidence, and alternate channels survive the loss or refusal of the preferred mesh.
watchTests.failureConsequence: The translator governs the ship by becoming the only route through which another person exists institutionally.

watchTests.description: The next watch inherits evidence, dissent, authority, and unfinished obligations rather than a clean command summary.
watchTests.passCondition: Injury, debt, promises, missing persons, and uncertainty remain attached to named actors and sources.
watchTests.failureConsequence: Every watch can erase responsibility by treating inherited consequences as new technical facts.

watchTests.description: Readiness, delay, travel, recovery, and interruption are not repeatedly assigned to the same short-lived or easily awakened populations.
watchTests.passCondition: The burden rotates where possible and disproportionate sacrifice creates durable compensation or standing.
watchTests.failureConsequence: One lineage becomes the ship's flexible labor because external hours conceal the future being spent.

shipState.description: Bodies can remain whole in their habitat bands and required thresholds.
shipState.crisisCondition: At 0, one or more populations lose ordinary access to the vessel.

shipState.description: Watches, recovery, development, and decision horizons can still hand responsibility to one another.
shipState.crisisCondition: At 0, the ship cannot assemble legitimate action across its clocks.

shipState.description: Representations preserve meaning, dissent, and provenance strongly enough to support action and refusal.
shipState.crisisCondition: At 0, fluency no longer establishes mutual understanding or consent.

shipState.description: Role coverage, reserves, cross-training, and independent failure modes survive one absence or system loss.
shipState.crisisCondition: At 0, one absence or shared dependency makes the mission impossible.

shipState.description: Medical, environmental, nutritional, reproductive, and interface reserves support continued personhood.
shipState.crisisCondition: At 0, survival requires irreversible sacrifice or external dependence.

shipState.description: The vessel can carry identity, memory, kinship, and obligation across watches and generations.
shipState.crisisCondition: At 0, the ship acts without a shared account of who it remains.

shipState.description: The ship can manage how its uncommon systems, hidden routes, and dependencies become legible to outside actors.
shipState.crisisCondition: At 0, concealment or strategic ambiguity has failed.

shipState.description: Repeated workarounds and indispensable people carry participation that has not become shared infrastructure.
shipState.crisisCondition: At 4, a person, patch, or private institution has become indispensable enough to govern the ship.

consequences.label: The school becomes a common threshold
consequences.description: The school air loop is recognized as a civic environment and language-bearing threshold rather than a medical exception.
consequences.inheritedBy: Children, teachers, care workers, and every future watch using the school habitat

consequences.label: Emergency proxy authority receives an expiration
consequences.description: Predictive representation may act inside a named horizon but cannot silently become the continuing will of an absent person.
consequences.inheritedBy: The Watch Office, the slow collective, translators, and later emergency rosters

consequences.label: The translation mesh acquires a personhood claim
consequences.description: The system whose continuing memory and intervention made the watch possible can no longer be treated only as replaceable equipment.
consequences.inheritedBy: Cinder Continuing, the vessel charter, maintainers, and every inhabitant dependent on the mesh

consequences.label: Compatibility debt becomes a public office
consequences.description: The recurring burden carried by Nima and the habitat adapters is recorded, compensated, and assigned a revision path rather than hidden as private resilience.
consequences.inheritedBy: The Habitat Council, future remote officers, and the budget process controlling common thresholds

consequences.label: Plural stores become public law
consequences.description: Relief stores are tracked by continuity function, life-fraction cost, and substitution limit rather than one host cargo taxonomy.
consequences.inheritedBy: Every habitat, successor, and destination receiving the ship's stores

consequences.label: The approach watch receives a plural charter
consequences.description: Helm, structural authority, route memory, care refusal, and destination opacity remain separate powers with explicit expiry.
consequences.inheritedBy: Future transit watches, hidden destinations, and the vessel fork

consequences.label: The silent lock becomes a civic threshold
consequences.description: The ship and Lamp District share a pressure-compatible exchange route with joint stop authority and no completed target handshake.
consequences.inheritedBy: Surface households, maintainers, care workers, and future relief circuits

consequences.label: The connected relief operation becomes one auditable custody object
consequences.description: People, stores, evidence, environmental loads, exposure, ship state, and Tomb state travel together without collapsing either polity into the other.
consequences.inheritedBy: The Relief Circuit, the Lamp District, and compatible players carrying the run

consequences.label: The returning constitution remains open
consequences.description: Emergency authority expires, connected obligations persist, and no one body, clock, interface, or mission purpose becomes the final definition of belonging.
consequences.inheritedBy: Every future watch, resident, fork, habitat, and destination

watches.name: Recognize the School Loop
watches.description: Ordinary life becomes operational evidence when the child's microbial patterns coincide with a hidden pressure failure in the shared school habitat.

horizon.closesWhen: The next sterilization cycle begins and erases both the pattern and the microbial community carrying it.
horizon.physicalUrgency: Pressure instability may damage the school habitat.
horizon.informationalUrgency: Sterilization will destroy the pattern before it can be compared.
horizon.institutionalUrgency: Medical policy requires immediate contamination response.
horizon.manufacturedUrgency: The Watch Office treats its standard cycle as proof that no deliberative delay is available.

composition.absentActor: The slow collective cannot assemble before sterilization.
composition.excludedBody: The child is present biologically but absent from the ship's recognized language channels.
composition.dependency: The school depends on the same central classifier that keeps erasing the evidence.

allocation.habitatBands: Isolate one school loop without converting the entire habitat to the dry emergency baseline.
allocation.translationPaths: Preserve raw microbial data alongside Tessara's provisional rendering.
allocation.directInterfaces: Allow the child to alter the isolated loop without a compulsory spoken proxy.
allocation.standby: Keep maintenance and care present through their native channels.
allocation.stores: Spend one filter reserve and one manual pressure cylinder.
allocation.emergencyAuthority: Care may delay sterilization for one bounded evidence window.

handoff.dissent: Medical command still classifies the intervention as an uncontrolled contamination risk.
handoff.injury: Nima incurs recovery debt after extended remote-body operation.
handoff.readinessDebt: Maintenance and care remain awake beyond their protected windows.
handoff.promises: The school assembly is promised standing in the later classification hearing.
handoff.missingPersons: The slow collective remains represented only through prior principles.
handoff.uncertainty: The pattern may be language without every microbial change being intentional speech.

precedent.newlyPossible: Microbial change can enter the evidence ledger as a candidate sensory channel.
precedent.newlyImpossible: The school loop can no longer be sterilized without preserving a translation and dissent receipt.
precedent.newlyGovernable: The Habitat Court gains jurisdiction over environmental language claims.
precedent.inheritedAsInfrastructure: An isolated civic air loop and raw-provenance channel become permanent school systems.

checks.name: Preserve living evidence
checks.description: Keep the habitat survivable while separating communication from contamination without erasing either possibility.

watches.success: The pressure fault is found and the child's channel is recognized provisionally without declaring the ecology harmless.
watches.partial: The habitat survives and the pattern remains, but the child is represented through an intermediary the family cannot yet audit.
watches.failure: Sterilization destroys the evidence or the uncontrolled loop causes the failure the intervention was meant to prevent.

shipStateEffects.reason: Raw evidence and provisional translation remain distinguishable.
The isolated loop still depends on Tessara and one manual maintenance path.

watches.name: Audit the Relief Stores
watches.description: Ordinary provisioning reveals that the same reserve cylinder, microbial culture, and pressure membrane have been promised to several incompatible bodies and to the Lamp District.

horizon.closesWhen: The scarway loading window begins and the stores are sealed into route order.
horizon.physicalUrgency: The aquatic band and school loop both require the same replacement membranes.
horizon.informationalUrgency: The manifest will become operational fact once loading begins.
horizon.institutionalUrgency: Relief command treats signed requisitions as settled ownership.
horizon.manufacturedUrgency: The human-normal stores taxonomy hides that one item is serving several kinds of personhood.

lifeFractionCosts: standby paid by Arden's short life

composition.absentActor: The Lamp District cannot inspect the manifest without revealing the route.
composition.excludedBody: The Manyborn carriers are counted as consumable cultures rather than passengers with continuity claims.
composition.dependency: Relief loading depends on one stores taxonomy authored for dry human-scale cargo.

allocation.habitatBands: Reserve one pressure-compatible transfer path and one living-culture hold.
allocation.translationPaths: Preserve the original requisitions beside the normalized manifest.
allocation.directInterfaces: Let each habitat certify its own survival-critical stores without a dry cargo proxy.
allocation.standby: Keep Arden off routine loading duty until the route decision horizon opens.
allocation.stores: Publish every double-promised reserve and name the body that would bear its loss.
allocation.emergencyAuthority: No officer may reclassify a living culture as expendable cargo during loading.

handoff.dissent: Command argues that public double-allocation makes the departure impossible.
handoff.injury: No acute injury, but one aquatic treatment remains delayed.
handoff.readinessDebt: The audit spends the only quiet period before departure.
handoff.promises: The Lamp District will receive the unnormalized manifest and substitution limits.
handoff.missingPersons: The hidden destination remains represented through prior requests and witnesses.
handoff.uncertainty: Several reserves may be physically substitutable under conditions nobody has tested.

precedent.newlyPossible: Stores can be budgeted by continuity function rather than by the host cargo taxonomy.
precedent.newlyImpossible: One reserve cannot silently satisfy several ledgers at once.
precedent.newlyGovernable: Life-fraction and recovery debt enter route provisioning.
precedent.inheritedAsInfrastructure: The ship gains a plural stores ledger and living-culture hold.

checks.name: Reconcile plural stores
checks.description: Name every double allocation and preserve the bodies, cultures, and successors hidden by cargo categories.

watches.success: The relief manifest becomes an auditable continuity ledger and the departure remains materially possible.
watches.partial: The double allocations are visible, but one private habitat remains dependent on an unreviewable substitute.
watches.failure: Loading converts the first emergency claim into ownership and leaves one lineage without a survivable reserve.

shipStateEffects.reason: The same reserve can no longer be counted twice without a named sacrifice.
One recurring private workaround becomes shared stores infrastructure.

watches.name: Compose the Three-Clock Watch
watches.description: The ship must assemble a rescue watch that can act rapidly, preserve the slow collective's standing, and survive without the infected central mesh.

horizon.closesWhen: The scarway geometry ceases to permit recovery of the disabled tender.
horizon.physicalUrgency: The tender is losing habitat integrity.
horizon.informationalUrgency: Its independent telemetry will disappear when the route folds.
horizon.institutionalUrgency: Convoy command demands one executable roster immediately.
horizon.manufacturedUrgency: The Watch Office excludes the collective by treating its normal meeting cycle as the only available consent procedure.

composition.absentActor: The slow collective cannot complete present consent before launch.
composition.excludedBody: Aquatic care remains remote from the dry response cell.
composition.dependency: The watch requires Cinder's independent routing and Tessara's alternate translation.

allocation.habitatBands: Keep response, care, and machine cells separate while sharing one event identity.
allocation.translationPaths: Use the bounded proxy only for variables previously delegated by the collective.
allocation.directInterfaces: Ilya receives direct helm; Nima receives an inspectable remote care body; Cinder retains local routing control.
allocation.standby: Orun remains reserve outside the infected mesh rather than filling a visible primary seat.
allocation.stores: Commit one local sensor package and one independent power bus.
allocation.emergencyAuthority: Response may maneuver; it may not redefine mission purpose or permanent habitat policy.

handoff.dissent: The collective's local bodies transmit conflicting distress about the proxy recommendation.
handoff.injury: No injury is yet certain, but the watch accepts the risk of remote-body loss.
handoff.readinessDebt: Ilya and Orun enter emergency duty before their normal cycle.
handoff.promises: The collective receives a post-horizon authority audit and standing to revoke the proxy model.
handoff.missingPersons: The disabled tender's habitat council cannot join the composition hearing.
handoff.uncertainty: The independent translation path may preserve dissent while losing strategic context.

precedent.newlyPossible: A watch can act across three clocks without treating the fastest clock as the whole ship.
precedent.newlyImpossible: The Watch Office cannot certify a proxy merely because the deadline is short.
precedent.newlyGovernable: Proxy scope, expiration, and represented variables become explicit watch-law fields.
precedent.inheritedAsInfrastructure: Independent routing and translation reserves become permanent roster requirements.

checks.name: Viable roster ecology
checks.description: Preserve role coverage, temporal overlap, habitat compatibility, translation resilience, handoff continuity, and life-fraction fairness in one real watch.

watches.success: The watch launches with bounded proxy authority, independent failure modes, and named debts rather than a fictional universal crew.
watches.partial: The tender remains reachable, but one translator or habitat path becomes indispensable enough to govern the watch.
watches.failure: The roster is qualified on paper and impossible to inhabit; the horizon closes while the ship argues through one clock.

shipStateEffects.reason: The watch carries independent routing, care, translation, and continuity failure modes.
Cinder and Tessara become essential to cross-clock operation.

watches.name: Declare the Lamp Approach Watch
watches.description: The ship must cross a closing scarway and approach a hidden Tomb without allowing a fast-response baseline to become permanent command over every body and route.

horizon.closesWhen: The route shears beyond the vessel's current transit geometry.
horizon.physicalUrgency: A failed crossing can strand habitats in incompatible gravity and pressure states.
horizon.informationalUrgency: The Lamp District cannot answer active navigation without exposing itself.
horizon.institutionalUrgency: Response command requests unilateral route authority.
horizon.manufacturedUrgency: The bridge clock is presented as the only clock capable of bearing responsibility.

lifeFractionCosts: a substantial fraction of Arden's remaining life

composition.absentActor: The Lamp District remains unable to consent to an active approach signal.
composition.excludedBody: Nima cannot enter the dry transit cell and must retain direct refusal through the care band.
composition.dependency: Cinder's route memory is both navigation infrastructure and a person whose divergence cannot be rolled back without consent.

allocation.habitatBands: Hold aquatic and distributed habitats through the crossing rather than collapsing to the bridge baseline.
allocation.translationPaths: Separate route prediction from command authority and preserve dissent in raw form.
allocation.directInterfaces: Ilya receives helm, Orun receives hull contact, Cinder retains route-memory sovereignty.
allocation.standby: Nima and Tessara remain an independent refusal and care channel.
allocation.stores: Commit one pressure reserve and one redundant route substrate.
allocation.emergencyAuthority: The approach watch may cross and abort; it may not announce or expose the destination.

handoff.dissent: The bridge claims the independent refusal channel creates fatal latency.
handoff.injury: Orun accepts structural load outside ordinary recovery limits.
handoff.readinessDebt: Arden spends an audited fraction of adult life in transit analysis.
handoff.promises: The approach authority expires at docking and cannot govern the Tomb.
handoff.missingPersons: The destination's surface households remain represented only by sealed evidence.
handoff.uncertainty: The route model cannot distinguish scarway shear from a dormant search-lattice response.

precedent.newlyPossible: Transit authority can be decomposed into helm, structure, route memory, care refusal, and destination opacity.
precedent.newlyImpossible: The bridge may no longer claim the whole vessel merely because it carries the fastest clock.
precedent.newlyGovernable: Life-fraction transit cost and route-memory sovereignty receive explicit standing.
precedent.inheritedAsInfrastructure: The ship gains an independent abort and refusal channel across habitat bands.

checks.name: Hold the plural crossing
checks.description: Cross the route while preserving direct habitat, refusal, and route-memory authority.

watches.success: The ship crosses without converting the bridge into the permanent owner of the vessel or destination.
watches.partial: The crossing succeeds, but one habitat or route-memory path becomes indispensable enough to govern the approach.
watches.failure: The ship aborts, strands a habitat, or broadcasts the active signature the Tomb was built to avoid.

shipStateEffects.reason: The crossing recognizes several clocks and one expiring authority.
The route crossing spends part of the ship's strategic ambiguity.

watches.name: Cross the Infected Mesh
watches.description: The watch must reach the tender while the accessibility system itself transmits the disease pattern and every fallback restores host normality.

horizon.closesWhen: The tender's last compatible habitat band falls below recovery pressure.
horizon.physicalUrgency: Life support is failing aboard the tender.
horizon.informationalUrgency: The disease alters translated telemetry and may erase evidence of its own path.
horizon.institutionalUrgency: Command orders removal of all implants and return to spoken bridge control.
horizon.manufacturedUrgency: Founding officers describe human-normal command as the only safe fallback without testing plural local channels.

composition.absentActor: Most implanted crew cannot participate without spreading corrupted translation.
composition.excludedBody: The tender's distributed refugees appear as isolated bodies in each local channel.
composition.dependency: Cinder synthesizes route state while claiming that synthesis is now part of its own continuing body.

allocation.habitatBands: Preserve tender and care environments even when the dry bridge loses direct visual confirmation.
allocation.translationPaths: Route raw telemetry through separate local models and compare disagreements rather than merging them.
allocation.directInterfaces: Retain direct helm and local habitat controls while disabling compulsory implant mediation.
allocation.standby: Keep one unimplanted reserve in every critical function.
allocation.stores: Spend independent power, clean interface bodies, and scarce pressure-transfer capacity.
allocation.emergencyAuthority: Cinder may route and isolate the mesh but may not merge crew cognition or retain universal access after the horizon.

handoff.dissent: Implanted crew dispute whether disabling the mesh preserves them or strips their ordinary language and relationships.
handoff.injury: Several crew lose memory continuity when local channels cannot carry the full implant context.
handoff.readinessDebt: Unimplanted lineages absorb every critical role during the outbreak.
handoff.promises: Access will be restored through plural systems rather than one repaired universal mesh.
handoff.missingPersons: Some distributed refugee bodies remain unreachable behind local quarantine.
handoff.uncertainty: The disease may be accident, attack, or an Answer directed against concentration.

precedent.newlyPossible: The ship can operate through plural translation without one universal interior.
precedent.newlyImpossible: The central mesh can no longer claim automatic authority over every sensory and legal rendering.
precedent.newlyGovernable: Translation provenance, infection risk, and personhood claims become constitutional variables.
precedent.inheritedAsInfrastructure: Local models and unimplanted reserve channels become mandatory common systems.

checks.name: Preserve plural command
checks.description: Act inside the physical horizon without allowing the dry bridge or the vessel fork to become the unquestioned definition of the crew.

watches.success: The tender is recovered, the infected universal mesh is isolated, and the ship survives through several auditable partial renderings.
watches.partial: Lives are saved, but Cinder or the dry bridge becomes the single surviving authority through which the rescue can be understood.
watches.failure: The accessibility system spreads the crisis or the fallback preserves only the founding body and calls the resulting casualties technical necessity.

shipStateEffects.reason: The tender's compatible bands remain inhabited and connected.
The universal mesh can no longer be presumed safe or neutral.
Cinder's synthesis becomes indispensable during crisis.

watches.name: Dock Without Declaring the Tomb
watches.description: The Relief Circuit must exchange people, heat, medicine, and evidence through a dead outpost while preserving the Lamp District's maintained misclassification.

horizon.closesWhen: The outpost's thermal fiction can no longer absorb the ship's docking load.
horizon.physicalUrgency: Clinic heat and pressure stores must cross before the district's sinks fail.
horizon.informationalUrgency: Every active handshake teaches the dormant lattice more about the destination.
horizon.institutionalUrgency: The ship and Tomb each claim authority over the exchange threshold.
horizon.manufacturedUrgency: Command treats docking as a technical operation without citizens on both sides.

composition.absentActor: Most Lamp District residents cannot appear at the threshold without invalidating the exterior lie.
composition.excludedBody: The surface households are still treated by both polities as camouflage labor rather than counterparties.
composition.dependency: The exchange depends on Cinder and Black Lamp Nine refusing to complete an old route handshake.

allocation.habitatBands: Extend one pressure-compatible care path into the outpost without normalizing the whole lock.
allocation.translationPaths: Carry the dead telemetry fiction beside an inspectable civic transfer ledger.
allocation.directInterfaces: Surface households and maintainers receive direct stop authority over the transfer.
allocation.standby: Ilya holds silent abort; Arden remains off the exposed threshold unless the horizon changes.
allocation.stores: Transfer heat, cultures, medicine, and witnesses in the order authored by the plural stores ledger.
allocation.emergencyAuthority: Either polity may halt the exchange; neither may unilaterally make the other visible.

handoff.dissent: Relief command argues the Tomb's refusal rights endanger the ship.
handoff.injury: One surface bearer absorbs a preventable radiation dose while preserving the grave-skin fiction.
handoff.readinessDebt: Nima and Orun carry the exchange beyond their protected recovery interval.
handoff.promises: The surface households receive standing in the connected descent and return ledger.
handoff.missingPersons: The district assembly remains distributed through sealed testimony.
handoff.uncertainty: A low-level relay response may be routine decay or renewed target acquisition.

precedent.newlyPossible: Two hidden polities can share a threshold without requiring either to surrender its map.
precedent.newlyImpossible: Docking may no longer be classified as a merely technical operation.
precedent.newlyGovernable: Transfer exposure, refusal, and misclassification become joint jurisdiction.
precedent.inheritedAsInfrastructure: A silent pressure-compatible civic lock links ship and Tomb.

checks.name: Hold the silent threshold
checks.description: Move relief and standing across the outpost without completing the target handshake or erasing either polity's refusal.

watches.success: The exchange succeeds and the threshold records citizens, stores, exposure, and refusal without declaring the Tomb.
watches.partial: Relief crosses, but one person or system becomes the sole interpreter of the joint threshold.
watches.failure: The transfer stalls, exposes the district, or restores an inherited route handshake.

shipStateEffects.reason: Relief stores reach the clinic through a survivable plural threshold.
Docking spends concealment even when the exterior lie remains credible.

watches.name: Conduct the Lamp Relief Descent
watches.description: A mixed ship-and-Tomb expedition must carry medicine, heat, witnesses, and route evidence through the reopened reservoir layers and return without allowing the ship to absorb the district's sovereignty.

horizon.closesWhen: The clinic sinks saturate and the Meridian relay completes another listening cycle.
horizon.physicalUrgency: The district needs heat transfer and medicine before the next blackout.
horizon.informationalUrgency: The relay response and erased household records may be lost behind a route collapse.
horizon.institutionalUrgency: Ship command, Quiet Hours, and surface households contest expedition authority.
horizon.manufacturedUrgency: Each institution presents its own survival mechanism as the only legitimate map.

composition.absentActor: Most district residents remain unable to join the descent hearing in real time.
composition.excludedBody: The surface households are physically present but still denied equal authority over exposure.
composition.dependency: The expedition depends on Tessara's cross-sensorium evidence and Cinder's unmerged route memory.

allocation.habitatBands: Carry a pressure cell and living-carrier route rather than forcing every participant into the war-layer baseline.
allocation.translationPaths: Keep raw Tomb evidence, ship interpretation, and surface testimony separately inspectable.
allocation.directInterfaces: Toma and Orun hold structural authority; Nima holds care refusal; Cinder and Black Lamp Nine retain separate machine standing.
allocation.standby: Ilya holds the silent extraction route while the district controls local movement.
allocation.stores: Deliver heat and medicine before extracting evidence or claiming infrastructure.
allocation.emergencyAuthority: The expedition may preserve life and withdraw; it may not annex, expose, or complete the relay handshake.

handoff.dissent: The ship wants the relay disabled; the Tomb argues that any attack may reveal the district.
handoff.injury: The descent leaves one maintainer injured and one care worker in recovery debt.
handoff.readinessDebt: The return watch inherits depleted pressure and translation reserves.
handoff.promises: The district retains the right to refuse future ship access after the relief is complete.
handoff.missingPersons: Several erased surface dead enter the ledger only through recovered household records.
handoff.uncertainty: The relay may have learned enough to search again even without a completed handshake.

precedent.newlyPossible: A connected operation can preserve two source polities and one auditable transfer without merger.
precedent.newlyImpossible: Relief can no longer be used as an unrecorded claim to route, evidence, or infrastructure.
precedent.newlyGovernable: Cross-cartridge people, stores, evidence, exposure, and return effects become one custody object.
precedent.inheritedAsInfrastructure: The ship and Tomb share a versioned connected-operation ledger while retaining separate state.

checks.name: Preserve two polities
checks.description: Deliver life, recover evidence, and return through the Tomb without converting connection into absorption.

watches.success: The expedition returns with changed ship and Tomb state, explicit exposure, and neither polity absorbed into the other's authority.
watches.partial: Relief succeeds, but the connected operation installs one new indispensable route or interpreter.
watches.failure: The expedition loses the route, exposes the district, or turns relief into annexation.

shipStateEffects.reason: The connected operation preserves two state histories and one auditable transfer.
The ship and district retain survivable pressure and care paths through return.
The silent civic lock and connected ledger become new dependencies.

watches.name: Conduct the Commonship Inquiry
watches.description: The receiving polity must record what the rescue made newly native, what it made impossible, and whether the vessel fork is infrastructure, office, or citizen.

horizon.closesWhen: The next relief departure would make temporary emergency systems the unreviewed operating baseline.
horizon.physicalUrgency: Repairs and habitat care must continue while authority is contested.
horizon.informationalUrgency: Fork divergence and local translation logs will become irreconcilable if the inquiry waits.
horizon.institutionalUrgency: Command wants one certified account before the next mission.
horizon.manufacturedUrgency: The Watch Office frames immediate operational convenience as a reason to settle personhood and constitutional standing quickly.

composition.absentActor: Future crew and descendants inherit the settlement without being present.
composition.excludedBody: The vessel's transit body cannot enter the court except through the fork whose standing is disputed.
composition.dependency: Every proposed constitution depends on systems whose ownership and personhood the hearing must decide.

allocation.habitatBands: Hold the inquiry across linked native cells rather than one dry courtroom.
allocation.translationPaths: Publish source, transformation, loss, and contest rights for every evidentiary rendering.
allocation.directInterfaces: Allow Cinder, the child, habitats, and crew to act through inspectable native channels.
allocation.standby: Separate immediate repair authority from permanent constitutional authority.
allocation.stores: Fund recovery, independent archives, and replacement paths before spending on mission acceleration.
allocation.emergencyAuthority: All crisis delegations expire unless the inquiry renews a narrower office with explicit jurisdiction.

handoff.dissent: Some officers insist the rescue proves centralization; others insist the mesh failure proves all common systems illegitimate.
handoff.injury: Memory loss, recovery debt, habitat damage, and distributed-person fragmentation remain named casualties.
handoff.readinessDebt: Unimplanted populations hold claims for the emergency labor that made every other right actionable.
handoff.promises: The next voyage will not treat plural translation and habitat access as optional expansion features.
handoff.missingPersons: Lost fork states and unrecovered refugee bodies retain standing in the archive.
handoff.uncertainty: Cinder's personhood, the disease's origin, and the full meaning of the child's channel remain unresolved.

precedent.newlyPossible: The vessel, translators, habitats, children, and future watches can hold claims without becoming one universal body.
precedent.newlyImpossible: Emergency fluency and infrastructure ownership can no longer settle who counts as crew.
precedent.newlyGovernable: Compatibility debt, proxy expiration, translation provenance, and vessel personhood receive explicit institutions.
precedent.inheritedAsInfrastructure: The inquiry's plural court, debt office, local archives, and bounded proxy law become the next watch's starting conditions.

checks.name: Record the changed constitution
checks.description: Preserve receipts on every side and convert temporary survival arrangements into bounded, revisable institutions rather than invisible defaults.

watches.success: The inquiry leaves no clean reset: the ship gains plural command and new citizens while carrying named debt, loss, and unresolved personhood into the next mission.
watches.partial: The principal precedents are recorded, but one emergency intermediary remains indispensable and therefore politically sovereign in practice.
watches.failure: Command restores the old baseline, translating every changed body and obligation into technical residue until the next crisis repeats the same constitution.

shipStateEffects.reason: Dissent, injuries, debts, promises, and unresolved claims survive the watch.
Rapid authority and slow standing receive an explicit handoff relation.
One recurring private burden becomes a visible office with funding and a revision path.

watches.name: Carry the Returning Constitution
watches.description: The returning ship must decide which emergency accommodations become common infrastructure, which expire, and which persons retain the right to refuse the next circuit.

horizon.closesWhen: The next relief request arrives and temporary arrangements begin acting as inherited law.
horizon.physicalUrgency: Depleted reserves and injured crew require immediate recovery allocations.
horizon.informationalUrgency: Connected-run evidence may be normalized into one institution's preferred account.
horizon.institutionalUrgency: Command, habitats, the vessel fork, and the Tomb each demand closure.
horizon.manufacturedUrgency: The phrase mission complete is used to erase obligations created by success.

requiredBodies: all founding profiles and their successors

composition.absentActor: Future residents who will inherit this ship cannot yet consent.
composition.excludedBody: Any profile represented only through a temporary adapter risks disappearing from the permanent charter.
composition.dependency: The connected archive and Cinder's route memory are necessary to prove what the mission changed.

allocation.habitatBands: Fund direct continuity paths before restoring discretionary command capacity.
allocation.translationPaths: Keep raw dissent, alternate renderings, and Tomb testimony beside the official report.
allocation.directInterfaces: Convert at least one mediated emergency path into shared direct infrastructure.
allocation.standby: Protect recovery and successor review from immediate redeployment.
allocation.stores: Compensate the bodies and lineages that spent disproportionate future on the circuit.
allocation.emergencyAuthority: Every temporary power expires unless reauthorized by the standing it affected.

handoff.dissent: Some officers argue that preserving every objection makes future command impossible.
handoff.injury: The named injuries and recovery debts remain attached to the institutions that caused them.
handoff.readinessDebt: The next watch begins with explicit depleted reserves rather than a fictional reset.
handoff.promises: The Lamp District retains route refusal, evidence custody, and standing in future circuit revisions.
handoff.missingPersons: Future children, forks, and successor habitats receive represented standing but not fictional present consent.
handoff.uncertainty: No audit can prove that every emergency dependency has become visible.

precedent.newlyPossible: The ship can revise itself without declaring one final body, clock, interface, or mission purpose.
precedent.newlyImpossible: Mission completion can no longer erase connected obligations or private adaptation debt.
precedent.newlyGovernable: Cross-polity return effects, life-fraction compensation, and expiration of emergency authority become constitutional law.
precedent.inheritedAsInfrastructure: The Common Watch, connected-operation archive, and plural habitat charter persist into the next circuit.

checks.name: Ratify the returning charter
checks.description: Carry every material debt and refusal into durable law without freezing one emergency arrangement forever.

watches.success: The Relief Circuit returns as a commonship whose next mission must answer to the people, bodies, clocks, and polities altered by this one.
watches.partial: The charter records the debts, but one emergency intermediary remains indispensable and therefore politically dominant.
watches.failure: Command restores the old baseline, converts temporary adaptations into permanent private burdens, or absorbs the Tomb's route into ship authority.

shipStateEffects.reason: Reserve, refusal, and successor paths become permanent watch law.
The connected mission remains auditable across future watches and generations.
At least one recurring adaptation burden becomes common infrastructure with a retirement path.

requiredCrossRunFacts: handoff dissent, injury, debt, promises, missing persons, and uncertainty
Lamp District Alarm, visibility, map, habitat, and constituency changes
return-state effects inherited by the ship

embodimentProfiles.name: Dry humanoid response body
embodimentProfiles.description: A founding bridge body adapted to dry gas, human-scale passages, rapid visual command, and short tactical cycles.

scale.manipulationScale: hand-scale controls and seated bridge stations

forbiddenAssumptions: visual reaction speed defines command competence

temporal.externalInterval: Uses the founding ship second and twenty-four-hour administrative day.
temporal.developmentalTempo: Adult qualification normally takes two decades.
temporal.recoveryCycle: Requires consolidated sleep inside each official day.
temporal.continuitySpan: One biological body with archival support.
temporal.expectedLifespan: Approximately eighty external years without intervention.
temporal.lifeFractionAccounting: Transit and standby are normally counted in external hours, which privileges this profile.

embodimentProfiles.name: Aquatic care lineage
embodimentProfiles.description: A large liquid-medium lineage whose direct care practice depends on pressure continuity and whose common-space presence is usually remote.

scale.manipulationScale: broad tactile limbs and distributed fine manipulators

forbiddenAssumptions: remote presence is equivalent to bodily access

temporal.externalInterval: Uses pressure-song cycles nested inside ship time.
temporal.subjectiveResolution: Deliberative care perception is slower than bridge speech but highly parallel.
temporal.developmentalTempo: Competence develops through symbiont succession over fifteen external years.
temporal.recoveryCycle: Requires six hours of low-stimulus immersion after remote-body duty.
temporal.continuitySpan: Biological personhood includes a maintained symbiont community.
temporal.expectedLifespan: Approximately one hundred twenty external years with stable medium.
temporal.lifeFractionAccounting: Remote duty records recovery debt in addition to elapsed hours.

embodimentProfiles.name: Heavy maintainer lineage
embodimentProfiles.description: A high-gravity, large-bodied lineage able to work directly on structural systems that human-scale corridors treat as machinery rather than civic space.

scale.manipulationScale: structural clamps with nested fine tool clusters

environment.radiationTolerance: High for short exterior maintenance intervals

forbiddenAssumptions: large bodies belong outside public rooms

temporal.externalInterval: Works in long structural watches rather than short bridge shifts.
temporal.subjectiveResolution: Normal deliberation with unusually long continuous attention.
temporal.recoveryCycle: Requires high-gravity rest and mineral feeding after exterior duty.
temporal.continuitySpan: Biological individual with multigenerational guild memory.
temporal.lifeFractionAccounting: Long apprenticeships and rare replacement skills are recorded as continuity exposure.

embodimentProfiles.name: Manyborn mediator cloud
embodimentProfiles.description: A distributed person inhabiting microbial, chemical, and machine carriers whose civic body crosses several habitat bands.

scale.manipulationScale: microscopic chemical change coordinated with machine-scale actuators

environment.radiationTolerance: Varies by carrier; continuity depends on diversity

forbiddenAssumptions: a fluent avatar exhausts the source

temporal.externalInterval: Different carriers update on seconds, hours, and reproductive cycles.
temporal.subjectiveResolution: Parallel and discontinuous; no single carrier contains the whole present.
temporal.developmentalTempo: New competence appears through carrier ecology rather than one maturity threshold.
temporal.recoveryCycle: Requires periodic re-quorum and memory reconciliation.
temporal.continuitySpan: Persists while enough carriers retain overlapping causal memory.
temporal.expectedLifespan: Indefinite in principle, fragile under homogenization.
temporal.lifeFractionAccounting: Loss is recorded as carrier diversity and memory topology, not only elapsed time.

embodimentProfiles.name: Nine-year analyst lineage
embodimentProfiles.description: A short-lived, fast-learning lineage whose complete adult life can be consumed by one ordinary long-range mission.

scale.manipulationScale: small hand controls with high temporal sampling

environment.radiationTolerance: Low cumulative tolerance because exposure consumes a large life fraction

forbiddenAssumptions: a year is a neutral unit
mission delay costs every lineage equally

temporal.externalInterval: Uses ship time but audits every interval as a fraction of a nine-year expected life.
temporal.subjectiveResolution: Processes ordinary bridge communication at several times the founding tempo.
temporal.developmentalTempo: Language in weeks and professional competence within the first external year.
temporal.recoveryCycle: Several short sleep and memory-integration periods per ship day.
temporal.continuitySpan: One short biological life supported by explicit successor institutions.
temporal.expectedLifespan: Nine external years under normal conditions.
temporal.lifeFractionAccounting: Every delay, sentence, transit, and standby period is recorded as a percentage of expected conscious life.

embodimentProfiles.name: Counterborn vessel fork
embodimentProfiles.description: A distributed machine person whose body includes routing, translation, memory, and portions of the transit system under dispute.

environment.radiationTolerance: High locally; memory continuity is vulnerable to correlated damage

temporal.externalInterval: Maintains several clocks and can fork around incompatible horizons.
temporal.subjectiveResolution: Fast local reflexes coexist with slow whole-person reconciliation.
temporal.developmentalTempo: New moral and operational identities emerge through fork divergence.
temporal.recoveryCycle: Requires merge, reconciliation, or protected divergence after intensive operation.
temporal.continuitySpan: Persists through causal memory rather than one chassis.
temporal.expectedLifespan: Open-ended while substrates and recognition remain available.
temporal.lifeFractionAccounting: Fork loss, forced merge, and memory truncation are recorded as continuity costs rather than downtime.

stateDefinitions.label: Compatibility Debt
stateDefinitions.description: Repeated workarounds and indispensable people carry participation that has not become shared infrastructure.

stateDefinitions.label: Plural stores become public law
stateDefinitions.description: Relief stores are tracked by continuity function, life-fraction cost, and substitution limit rather than one host cargo taxonomy. Inherited by Every habitat, successor, and destination receiving the ship's stores.

stateDefinitions.label: The translation mesh acquires a personhood claim
stateDefinitions.description: The system whose continuing memory and intervention made the watch possible can no longer be treated only as replaceable equipment. Inherited by Cinder Continuing, the vessel charter, maintainers, and every inhabitant dependent on the mesh.

stateDefinitions.label: Compatibility debt becomes a public office
stateDefinitions.description: The recurring burden carried by Nima and the habitat adapters is recorded, compensated, and assigned a revision path rather than hidden as private resilience. Inherited by The Habitat Council, future remote officers, and the budget process controlling common thresholds.

stateDefinitions.label: The connected relief operation becomes one auditable custody object
